sections.title: Technique
sections.default: AP and axial views of the {laterality} shoulder were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The glenohumeral joint is normally located without dislocation. The joint space is maintained. The acromioclavicular joint is normal. The humeral head, glenoid, acromion, coracoid and clavicle are intact. No fracture is identified. No periarticular calcification is seen. The visualized soft tissues are normal.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or dislocation of the {laterality} shoulder.

few_shot_normal.input: shoulder joint normal, no dislocation, clavicle intact

output.findings: The glenohumeral joint is normally located without dislocation. The joint space is maintained. The acromioclavicular joint is normal. The humeral head, glenoid, acromion and clavicle are intact. No fracture identified. No calcification.
output.impression: No fracture or dislocation of the shoulder.
